text:
Created attachment 231797
v1

Moin moin 


kde@ would like to ask for an exp-run to update KDE Frameworks to 5.91. 

The patch is attached, and can also be found here:
https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/0001-KDE-Update-KDE-Frameworks-to-5.91.patch

mfg Tobias
